title: HIAL Team Member Completes Volunteer Mission in Mexico

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
Gary Johnstone, Deputy Head of Fire and Airside Operations at HIAL, has recently completed his 14th international volunteering mission with the International Fire & Rescue Association in Mexico. This initiative underscores HIAL's commitment to supporting global firefighting and rescue efforts.

HIAL operates airports that connect communities across the Highlands and Islands, where aviation has played a vital role since the inter-war period. Johnstone's experience contributes to the vital exchange of expertise and knowledge between international fire services.
